title: BEM-866 restore queue after patch
objective:
Run script:
"""
q = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
p = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_processed/bem865_claude_write_selftest.json')
r = Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_results/bem865_claude_write_selftest_result.json')
mail = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_claude/BEM865_CLAUDE_WRITE_SELFTEST_RESPONSE.md')
q.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if p.exists():
    p.unlink()
if r.exists():
    r.unlink()
# reset mailbox to pending so the next write is proven by this run
mail.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
mail.write_text('# BEM-865 CLAUDE WRITE SELFTEST RESPONSE\nStatus: PENDING_CLAUDE_WRITE_TEST\n', encoding='utf-8')
task = 'BEM-865 Claude write selftest after claude.yml patch. Write mailbox response with Status: CLAUDE_WRITE_OK. No issue comments.'
data = {
    'workflow': 'claude.yml',
    'ref': 'main',
    'inputs': {
        'role': 'auditor',
        'provider': 'claude',
        'trace_id': 'bem865_claude_write_selftest',
        'cycle_id': 'bem865',
        'task_type': 'audit_write_selftest',
        'task': task
    }
}
q.write_text(json.dumps(data, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_QUEUE_RESTORED_AFTER_CLAUDE_PATCH.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 queue restored after Claude patch\nStatus: LIVE_QUEUE_RESTORED\nMailbox reset: PENDING_CLAUDE_WRITE_TEST\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(q))
changed_files.append(str(mail))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('restored queue after claude.yml mailbox write patch')
"""
No issue comments.
